zh.Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆
zh.Norwich, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦諾維其
zh.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mehitable Fisher於1648年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Anthony Fisher11645歲，母親Johanna Faxon11645歲。她於大約1667年與Peter Woodward Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1727年5月12日在她的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆

zh-hans.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mehitable Fisher于1648年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆时，她的父亲Anthony Fisher11645岁，母亲Johanna Faxon11645岁。她于大约1667年与Peter Woodward Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1727年5月12日在她的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

en.lifeSummary: When Mehitable Fisher was born on 27 June 1648, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Anthony Fisher, was 11645 and her mother, Johanna Faxon, was 11645. She married Peter Woodward Jr about 1667, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 12 May 1727, in her hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mehitable Fisher est née le 27 juin 1648, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Anthony Fisher, avait 11645 ans et sa mère, Johanna Faxon, avait 11645 ans. Elle a épousé Peter Woodward Jr environ 1667, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1727, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mehitable Fisher am 27. Juni 1648 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anthony Fisher 11645 und ihre Mutter Johanna Faxon 11645. Sie hat um 1667 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Peter Woodward Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1727 im Alter von 78 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitable Fisher è nata il il 27 giugno 1648 nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Anthony Fisher, aveva 11645 anni e sua madre, Johanna Faxon, aveva 11645 anni. Lei sposato Peter Woodward Jr circa 1667, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1727, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハム

ja.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハム
ja.lifeSummary: Mehitable Fisherが1648年6月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで生まれた時，父Anthony Fisherは11645歳，母Johanna Faxonは11645歳であった。約1667年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムでPeter Woodward Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1727年5月12日に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함
ko.Norwich, New London, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 노위치
ko.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함
ko.lifeSummary: Mehitable Fisher(이)가 1648년 6월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anthony Fisher(은)는 11645세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Faxon(은)는 11645세였다. 그녀는 대략 1667년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 Peter Woodward Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1727년 5월 12일 그녀의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitable Fisher nasceu em 27 de junho de 1648, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Anthony Fisher, tinha 11645 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Faxon, tinha 11645 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter Woodward Jr aproximadamente 1667, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1727, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mehitable Fisher родилась 27 июня 1648 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Anthony Fisher было 11645 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Faxon, 11645. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Woodward Jr около 1667 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 12 мая 1727 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

Se casó con Peter Woodward Jr aproximadamente 1667, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas.
